commands.label: Local release gate
commands.purpose: Refresh tests, model evidence, PWA output, Vercel readiness, supply review, data-room, and freshness gates before deployment.

commands.label: Pull Vercel settings
commands.purpose: Bind the working copy to the selected Vercel project using CI/local secrets only.

commands.label: Build prebuilt artifact
commands.purpose: Build the static PWA with production Vercel settings before deployment.

commands.label: Deploy prebuilt artifact
commands.purpose: Deploy the already-built static PWA artifact to production without remote rebuilding.

commands.label: Post-deploy smoke
commands.purpose: Verify the production URL renders release UI, PWA cache paths, and model-delivery screens.

commands.label: Inspect deployment
commands.purpose: Capture deployment status and metadata after production deploy.

commands.label: Rollback deployment
commands.purpose: Restore a previous production deployment if post-deploy smoke or monitoring fails.

phases.label: Static release proof
phases.nextAction: Run npm run release:check before deployment.

phases.label: Static Vercel config
phases.nextAction: Keep vercel.json on the static prebuilt PWA contract before deployment.

phases.label: Project binding
phases.nextAction: Run npx vercel pull --yes --environment=production --token=$VERCEL_TOKEN on the target Vercel account.

phases.label: Deployment secrets
phases.nextAction: Set VERCEL_TOKEN, VERCEL_ORG_ID, and VERCEL_PROJECT_ID only in local shell, Vercel settings, or GitHub secrets.

phases.label: Workflow template
phases.nextAction: Keep the documented Vercel workflow template aligned with release gate and prebuilt deploy commands.

phases.label: Workflow activation
phases.nextAction: Add Vercel GitHub secrets and activate .github/workflows/vercel-static-deploy.yml when workflow scope is available.

phases.label: Production smoke
phases.nextAction: Run MOVEBETA_SMOKE_URL=<deployment-url> python3 scripts/smoke_web_video.py after production deployment.

rollback.strategy: Use Vercel rollback to restore the previous production deployment if production smoke fails after deploy.

summary.nextAction: Run npx vercel pull --yes --environment=production --token=$VERCEL_TOKEN on the target Vercel account.
